response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong candidate with over 15 years of software engineering experience, significantly exceeding the 6+ years requirement. He possesses deep expertise in the required primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud infrastructure, while also fulfilling niche requirements like AI agent development (MCP) and Java. His strong background in testing, TDD, and software architecture makes him a highly qualified fit for this Senior Fullstack Developer role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and cloud platforms (AWS, Kubernetes).
Direct, recent experience in AI agent development and MCP (Model Context Protocol), perfectly matching a niche job requirement.
Exceptional testing and software craftsmanship background, including TDD, CI/CD, and building custom testing frameworks.
concerns: Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly mentioned on the resume, though his deep general Node.js and testing expertise mitigates this.
Has recently held 'Staff' titles, which might indicate he is overqualified or expecting compensation above a standard mid-senior role.
Python and Kotlin are missing from the resume, though he has strong Java experience for backend services.
